mechanism_narrative: A persistent decline in FEDFUNDS over the trailing 3 months signals monetary easing that lowers the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days regardless of the broader macro regime.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS 3-month change and forward 20d SPX returns stays below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises above a 0.5 percentage point increase from its trailing 6-month low, the labor market deterioration signal triggers risk-off repositioning by equity investors anticipating earnings compression, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: 60-day forward SPX returns following triggered UNRATE increases are positive in more than 55% of historical instances, or effect is not statistically distinguishable from unconditional base rate (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous deceleration in PAYEMS growth alongside contraction in INDPRO indicates a joint labor-and-production slowdown that amplifies recession risk beyond what either series signals alone, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days when both conditions co-occur.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month annualized growth < 0% AND INDPRO month-over-month change < 0%
failure_condition: Joint-trigger instances show 20d forward returns statistically indistinguishable from returns triggered by either single-series condition alone (interaction term not significant at p < 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: During a monetary tightening cycle (FEDFUNDS rising over trailing 6 months), a decline in HOUST signals housing-sector demand destruction that historically precedes broader consumption pullback, generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter; outside tightening cycles the same HOUST decline has muted predictive power.
candidate_trigger: HOUST declines > 5% over 3 months while FEDFUNDS is rising
failure_condition: Effect direction reverses or Rank IC falls below 0.02 within tightening-cycle subsamples across at least two distinct historical tightening episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A rising 3-month trend in INDPRO reflects expanding industrial output and corporate revenue momentum, which propagates into near-term equity price appreciation over the following trading week as analysts revise earnings expectations upward.
failure_condition: 5-day forward SPX return correlation with INDPRO 3-month trend remains below 0.03 Rank IC across rolling 2-year windows or sign flips persistently.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation crosses above 3%, markets price in expectations of accelerated Fed tightening, compressing valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the subsequent month until inflation growth decelerates.
failure_condition: Post-trigger 20d forward returns are not significantly lower than unconditional baseline returns (t-test p > 0.10) across at least three historical inflation breakout episodes.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales growth (RSAFS) combined with an accommodative FEDFUNDS level below 1% jointly signal robust consumer demand unconstrained by financing costs, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next trading week as consumption-driven earnings surprises materialize faster than valuation adjustments.
failure_condition: Joint-condition 5-day forward returns are not significantly higher than returns following RSAFS strength alone in a high-rate environment (interaction coefficient not significant at p < 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle expansion regime marked by decelerating GDPC1 growth over two consecutive quarters, the deceleration signals reduced forward earnings capacity, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter as investors reprice growth expectations downward; this relationship is muted during early or mid-cycle expansions.
failure_condition: GDPC1 deceleration episodes during late-cycle regime show 60-day forward SPX returns positive in more than 55% of instances, or Rank IC below 0.03 in late-cycle subsample.
